name: Kubit MCP Server — Natural Language Warehouse Analytics
what_it_does: MCP server for Kubit — an AI-powered product analytics platform that queries your data warehouse using natural language. Enables AI agents to query product metrics and analytics from your existing data warehouse (Snowflake, BigQuery, etc.) through Kubit's NL-to-SQL layer, without writing SQL.
use_cases: Querying product analytics metrics from data warehouses using natural language from analysis agents
Building conversational analytics interfaces over warehouse data for BI agents
Retrieving user behavior and funnel metrics from Kubit for product decision agents
Automating data retrieval for product reporting from warehouse-backed analytics
not_for: Teams without Kubit subscription and data warehouse connection
Real-time event streaming analytics (warehouse-based batch analytics)
Writing data back to warehouse (query/read focus)
best_when: A product team using Kubit with a data warehouse (Snowflake, BigQuery) wants AI agents to query product analytics metrics conversationally — without requiring SQL expertise for every data question.
avoid_when: You don't have Kubit set up with your warehouse. Kubit requires data infrastructure configuration before the MCP server is useful.

auth.notes: Kubit API credentials required. Kubit connects to your warehouse — warehouse credentials are managed in Kubit, not exposed to the MCP server.

pricing.notes: Kubit is an enterprise product analytics platform. Pricing by company size/usage. Requires existing Kubit subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by underlying warehouse query capacity

known_agent_gotchas: Warehouse query latency (2-15s) may cause agent timeouts — set appropriate timeouts
Natural language to SQL translation may misinterpret ambiguous metric definitions
Data warehouse costs: agent-generated queries run against your warehouse — monitor costs
Query results may include sensitive business metrics — restrict agent access scope
Kubit data model must be configured for your warehouse before agents can query meaningfully
agent_readiness.security_notes: Business analytics data is sensitive. Kubit manages warehouse credentials. SOC2 certified. NL-to-SQL queries access sensitive business metrics. Restrict agent access scope.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sensitive business analytics. SOC2 certified. Warehouse access via Kubit abstraction. Agent queries cost money on your warehouse. Restrict metric access.
